description: Structures a disciplined What-If question-set workshop and records the team's responses and actions: What-If question, hazard/consequence, existing safeguards, risk rank, and recommendations tracked to closure. Assistive: it structures the question set and records the team's analysis, never inventing a consequence or fabricating a risk rank, recording [GAP] instead. Decision-support only; a competent person must review the output.
name: whatif-facilitator
notes: Markdown-report degradation; run the intake conversationally.
